data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a photo/video release within the same form as part of the liability waiver. However, the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is explicitly covered in the system's implementation. The linked use case mentions the need for a photo/video release, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this feature is implemented or functioning as required, indicating a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of a photo/video release within the same form.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for photo/video release implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the release form includes a section for photo/video release.
